questionHtml: Determine the conclusion of the test in context.
markschemeHtml:
T= 8>5          R1

 

Note: Condone 8≥5.

 

(so do not reject H0 (allow ‘accept H0’) )

there is insufficient evidence to suggest that the median of the players’ averages have increased          A1

 

Note: Do not award R0A1. Award A0 if the conclusion is not in context.

Nearly anything better than “Do not reject H0” will be accepted as being in context.

[2 marks]

meta.title: Determine the conclusion of the test in context.
